Bus Timings

Bus 96 Schedule Al Quoz Bus Station to Danata (Dubai Investment Park)

February 13, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Let me tell you about Bus 96 - it’s a real workhorse, you know? This route runs from Al Quoz Bus Station all the way to Danata in Dubai Investment Park. It’s a total lifesaver for folks working or living in those industrial areas and neighborhoods. If you’re commuting between Al Quoz and Jebel Ali, this bus has got your back.

It shows up pretty often, so you’re not left hanging around. The cool thing is, it’s not just for workers - plenty of residents hop on too. They’ve got these smart stop locations that make it super easy to get to all those big commercial areas in Dubai. And get this - it won’t burn a hole in your pocket. That’s why loads of people doing the daily grind swear by it.

Route Name 96
Route Description Al Quoz Bus Station · 8 - Danata (Dubai Investment Park)
Total Distance Approximately 30-40 km
Total Journey Time Approximately 1 hour 11 minutes
Operational Hours 06:00 to 22:45 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 5-12
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 96

Bus 96 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

Bus 96 operates with a consistent schedule throughout the day, ensuring frequent service. Here are the departure times:

Bus 96 Timetable

To see all timings, visit the RTA official website or check this link for Bus 96 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for Bus 96 follows Dubai’s standard public transport pricing. A single journey generally costs AED 5-12 with a Nol Card. The exact fare may vary depending on the card type and the number of travel zones crossed. For the most accurate fare information, passengers should consult the RTA Dubai app or check at metro stations. Remember to always have sufficient balance on your Nol Card for a seamless journey.

Bus Booking

Bus 96 does not offer online booking options. Passengers can board the bus directly at any of the designated stops along the route. For real-time tracking and schedule updates, the RTA Dubai app is highly recommended. This app provides essential information to help plan your journey more effectively, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free travel experience. Using the app can save you time and help avoid unnecessary delays.

Bus 96 Station Overview

Al Quoz Bus Station · 8

Al Quoz Bus Station is a significant transit hub located in the heart of the Al Quoz industrial and commercial district. It serves as a vital connection point for various bus routes, facilitating travel across the city. The station is equipped with essential amenities including ticket counters, waiting areas, and restrooms, ensuring a convenient and efficient travel experience for both daily commuters and visitors. Its central location within a busy business area makes it a key stop for those traveling to and from Al Quoz.

Danata (Dubai Investment Park)

Danata Bus Station, situated in Dubai Investment Park, provides crucial connectivity for residents and workers in this growing area. Located close to various commercial and industrial zones, the station supports seamless travel to and from major business hubs.

It features basic amenities such as seating and schedule information, catering to the needs of those commuting within the park and to other parts of Dubai. The station’s placement in a prominent industrial area highlights its role in facilitating efficient transportation for a diverse range of passengers.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The Bus 96 route primarily serves industrial and commercial areas between Al Quoz Bus Station and Danata in Dubai Investment Park (DIP). These areas are more focused on business, manufacturing, and labor accommodations, rather than tourist attractions. 1.

2.

3.

Though Bus 96 itself doesn’t pass through major tourist destinations, it does provide access to key areas where you can find some cultural and recreational spots.

Journey Experience

As the bus departs from Al Quoz, you will find yourself amidst a dynamic area known for its art scene, featuring numerous galleries and studios that attract artists and art lovers alike.

The route takes you through various neighborhoods, revealing the diverse architectural styles and urban landscapes that characterize Dubai. Notably, you’ll pass close to the Mall of the Emirates, a major shopping destination famed for its indoor ski slope and luxury brands, making it a landmark of leisure and shopping.

As the bus continues towards Danata, the journey transitions into the more industrial zones of Dubai, where you can observe various commercial and logistical operations. Dubai Investment Park itself is a fascinating area, designed to support businesses and industries, showcasing the emirate’s focus on economic diversification. This trip not only highlights the contrasts within Dubai but also provides insights into its growth and development, making it an informative and enjoyable experience.

Travelling with Careem

The fare for this ride typically ranges between AED 84 to AED 101, offering a flexible and comfortable alternative for those looking to reach their destination more quickly.

In conclusion, Bus 96 connects Al Quoz with Danata in Dubai Investment Park, serving key business and residential areas. Its frequent service makes it a reliable choice for commuters. While online booking isn’t available, the RTA Dubai app offers real-time updates and schedules, ensuring a smooth travel experience. For added convenience, the app also helps passengers plan their journey more efficiently.
